generated_oml:
instance TelemetryDataCollector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Collects sensor readings, operational status indicators, and telemetry logs from the physical system for digital representation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TelemetryDataStream
]

instance TelemetryDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TelemetryDataCollector
]

instance SysMLGeometryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Geometric representation extracted from SysML design."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelRepository
    DTDFVocab:fromData TelemetryDataStream
]

instance SimulinkSimulationTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation trace from Simulink capturing dynamic behavior correlated with SysML logical architecture."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
    DTDFVocab:fromData TelemetryDataStream
]

instance SimulinkAnalyticalResult : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Analytical results produced by Simulink solvers during simulation runs."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
    DTDFVocab:fromData TelemetryDataStream
]

instance SimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine based on MathWorks Simulink enabling co-simulation of control logic and mechanical behavior."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationExecutionService
]

instance ModelRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Versioned repository storing SysML models, Simulink subsystems, and semantic annotations with traceability metadata."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelTraceabilityService
]

instance SimulationExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes Simulink simulation runs and code generation for C++/Java integration."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalStateInsight, SimulationQualityInsight
]

instance ModelTraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides metadata retrieval and traceability between SysML and Simulink models."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelTraceabilityInsight
]

instance OperationalStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the current operational state derived from Simulink simulation traces."
]

instance SimulationQualityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the fidelity and convergence of Simulink simulations."
]

instance ModelTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into model relationships and versioning between SysML architecture and Simulink representations."
]
